name: travelon-transfer-bot
description: 24/7 bot that asks TravelON agents for tourists' phone numbers for transfer drivers on newly confirmed bookings.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/runCycle.js && node --check src/travelon.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/store.js && node --check src/notify.js && node --check src/logger.js
